creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
I'm working on fixing ports that use pkg-install to create users -- some PRs have been submitted already.

	Since there are many usernames to add, patches attached to individual PRs quickly become stale, so here's a PR with the first batch of users included.

	I've put this one out before the whole lot is complete because I already submitted a small number before I realised that this would be a better option, hence ports/157507 ports/157520 ports/157525 ports/157526 depend on this PR.

Fix: Added users:
		murmur
		bbs
		dnetfold
		dbxml
		sybase
		hg
		dnrd

	Added groups:
		shoutcast
		daapd
		murmur
		bbs
		dnetfold
		dbxml
		sybase
		gnokii
		hg
		dnrd



-- 
This message has been scanned for viruses and
dangerous content by MailScanner, and is
believed to be clean.--4ysIrmw5ahswslmqjSHbL4k59BpskM2SD0RbOagwUrlKUjKX
